channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The 9 best river cruises for every type of traveler
item.description: Whether you're a foodie, an adventurous traveler, a luxury lover or a first-time cruiser, you can find the right river cruise for you.

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #77
item.description: If the thought of figuring out dinner every night is weighing you down, this week’s meal plan is for you.…

item.title: Delta set to unveil massive first-class cabin on its newest planes — but it's temporary
item.description: Delta Air Lines will begin flying an Airbus A321neo with a whopping 44 first-class seats this summer — but it's a temporary solution.

item.title: How to still get a free checked bag on Southwest Airlines flights
item.description: Southwest Airlines no longer offers two free bags to all, but credit cards and elite status can still help you avoid checked baggage fees. Here’s how ...

item.title: Best time to apply for Atmos Rewards cards based on offer history
item.description: The Atmos Rewards cards provide excellent welcome bonuses for Alaska and Hawaiian flyers. When is the best time to apply? Here is their welcome offer ...

item.title: Deal alert: Points and miles travel deals for February 2026
item.description: Save, maximize and earn points and miles on various travel purchases this February.

item.title: Whiskers on Elephant’s Trunk Are Key to its Amazing Sense of Touch
item.description: The whiskers on an elephant’s trunk are key to its “amazing” sense of touch, reveals new research. The 1,000 hairs that cover the trunk have unusual p...

item.title: 20 Best Presidents' Day Deals on Gear Our Reviewers Actually Used (2026)
item.description: Shop these limited-time sales to save on some of our favorite gadgets from Branch, Eufy, and more.

item.title: OpenAI removes access to sycophancy-prone GPT-4o model
item.description: The model is known for its overly sycophantic nature and its role in several lawsuits involving users' unhealthy relationships to the chatbot.

item.title: Social Security Workers Are Being Told to Hand Over Appointment Details to ICE
item.description: The recent request goes against decades of precedent and puts noncitizens at further risk of immigration enforcement actions.

item.title: Sex toys maker Tenga says hacker stole customer information
item.description: The Japanese sex toy maker said a hacker broke into an employee's inbox and stole customer names, email addresses, and correspondence, including order...

item.title: Record Low Snow in the West Will Mean Less Water, More Fire, and Political Chaos
item.description: Snowpack levels across a wide swath of western US states are among the lowest seen in decades, even as regulators struggle to negotiate water rights i...

item.title: CA Nonprofit Buys 6,100-acres of Sacred Land, Ending 10-year Battle Over Proposed Sand Mine
item.description: One of the largest private land purchases for conservation in California’s Bay Area was just carried out to save a historic ranch from being turned in...

item.title: Join Our Livestream: The Hype, Reality, and Future of EVs
item.description: Pose your questions to a panel of WIRED experts about the future of the electric vehicle industry.

item.title: Senators Urge Top Regulator to Stay Out of Prediction Market Lawsuits
item.description: As prediction market platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi battle regulators in court, Senate Democrats are urging the CFTC to avoid weighing in, escal...

item.title: The SEC closed its investigation into Fisker
item.description: The financial regulator revealed in a response to a TechCrunch records request that the probe was closed in September 2025.

item.title: Reasons Why Women Experience Hair Thinning
Exercise Benefits for a Faster Metabolism
item.description: More intense workouts can temporarily raise your metabolic rate. Learn how exercise affects metabolism and which workouts have the greatest impact.
